Title: Viking Wolf
Actors: Elli Rhiannon Müller Osborne, Liv Mjönes, Ívar Örn Sverrisson
Plot: Seventeen-year-old Thale has just moved to a small town after her mother got a new job at the local police station. After a student is brutally killed at a party Thale attends, she becomes a key witness. Was the killer an animal? ...
